name: my-harness
description: Generic project harness generator. Bootstraps any combination of Hono / Cloudflare D1 / Resend / Playwright / Maestro / Android / iOS. Provides 4-lane parallel development, TDD enforcement, Codex integration via a shared `codex app-server` daemon (~85% RAM cut on 16-lane teams), secret masking, RTK-based Bash output compression, and git discipline as composable skills. Fresh-machine bootstrap from Nix flake alone — no brew/npm/pip required.
